title: tragopogon pratensis subsp. hayekii
intro: Tragopogon pratensis subsp. hayekii, also known as salsify or goat's beard, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with medicinal properties that include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid digestion, support immune function, and provide relief from symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Tragopogon pratensis subsp. hayekii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the roots and leaves being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
